title: minuartia tenuifolia var. mediterranea
intro: Minuartia tenuifolia var. mediterranea, also known as the Mediterranean rock-cress, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Minuartia tenuifolia var. mediterranea is often used as a tea, tincture, or topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
